title: gomphocarpus orbicularis
intro: Gomphocarpus orbicularis, also known as the globe mallow or balloon cotton bush, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gomphocarpus orbicularis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
